Game.Name: Sankyo Fever! Fever! (Japan)
Game.plot: Overview:First title of the Sankyo Fever series of video games. SANKYO, Co., Ltd. (株式会社三共 Kabushiki Kaisha Sankyo) is a Japanese manufacturer of pachinko machines.Three Honke Sankyo Fever Jikki Simulation titles were released for the Super Famicom. Other Sankyo Fever titles were released for the PlayStation, Sega Saturn, and WonderSwan.
Game.Notes: First title of the Sankyo Fever series of video games. SANKYO, Co., Ltd. (株式会社三共 Kabushiki Kaisha Sankyo) is a Japanese manufacturer of pachinko machines. Three Honke Sankyo Fever Jikki Simulation titles were released for the Super Famicom. Other Sankyo Fever titles were released for the PlayStation, Sega Saturn, and WonderSwan.
